name: risk-exposure-generative-ui-copilot
description: Generative UI demo with Microsoft Foundry, Databricks Genie, CopilotKit and AG-UI.

scripts.install:agent: python3.12 -m venv apps/agent/.venv && apps/agent/.venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && apps/agent/.venv/bin/python -m pip install -e 'apps/agent[dev]'
scripts.validate:web: npm run lint:web && npm run build:web
scripts.validate: npm run validate:agent && npm run validate:web
